# services.jitsi-videobridge

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.jitsi-videobridge`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.jitsi-videobridge.colibriRestApi` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the private rest API for the COLIBRI control interface. Needed for monitoring jitsi, enabling scraping of the /colibri/stats endpoint. |
| `services.jitsi-videobridge.config` | `attribute set` | Videobridge configuration. See <https://github.com/jitsi/jitsi-videobridge/blob/master/jvb/src/main/resources/reference.conf> for default configuration with comments. |
| `services.jitsi-videobridge.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Jitsi Videobridge, a WebRTC compatible video router. |
| `services.jitsi-videobridge.extraProperties` | `attribute set of string` | Additional Java properties passed to jitsi-videobridge. |
| `services.jitsi-videobridge.nat.harvesterAddresses` | `list of string` | Addresses of public STUN services to use to automatically find the public and local addresses of this Jitsi-Videobridge instance without the need for manual configuration. This option is ignored if {option}`services.jitsi-videobridge.nat.localAddress` and {option}`services.jitsi-videobridge.nat.publicAddress` are set. |
| `services.jitsi-videobridge.nat.localAddress` | `null or string` | Local address to assume when running behind NAT. |
| `services.jitsi-videobridge.nat.publicAddress` | `null or string` | Public address to assume when running behind NAT. |
| `services.jitsi-videobridge.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open ports in the firewall for the videobridge. |
| `services.jitsi-videobridge.xmppConfigs` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | XMPP servers to connect to. See <https://github.com/jitsi/jitsi-videobridge/blob/master/doc/muc.md> for more information. |
| `services.jitsi-videobridge.xmppConfigs.<name>.disableCertificateVerification` | `boolean` | Whether to skip validation of the server's certificate. |
| `services.jitsi-videobridge.xmppConfigs.<name>.domain` | `null or string` | Domain part of JID of the XMPP user, if it is different from hostName. |
| `services.jitsi-videobridge.xmppConfigs.<name>.hostName` | `string` | Hostname of the XMPP server to connect to. Name of the attribute set is used by default. |
| `services.jitsi-videobridge.xmppConfigs.<name>.mucJids` | `string` | JID of the MUC to join. JiCoFo needs to be configured to join the same MUC. |
| `services.jitsi-videobridge.xmppConfigs.<name>.mucNickname` | `string` | Videobridges use the same XMPP account and need to be distinguished by the nickname (aka resource part of the JID). By default, system hostname is used. |
| `services.jitsi-videobridge.xmppConfigs.<name>.passwordFile` | `string` | File containing the password for the user. |
| `services.jitsi-videobridge.xmppConfigs.<name>.userName` | `string` | User part of the JID. |
